comments: Approved. The drafted contract is tightly bounded to V0.8-M4 review automation: it limits implementation to generating bin/agent-protocol-review, reading workflow state files, checking *_review_pending gates, invoking an isolated child-process review path when the registry-specified runner applies, and conditionally advancing state only from the returned decision. The allowed file list is narrow, the stop conditions explicitly forbid bypassing the independent SubAgent process and forbid edits outside the approved file set, and the recon packet aligns with the same orchestration-only boundary. The out_of_scope section correctly and explicitly forbids Team Mode Cloud Sync logic (M5), legacy tool removal (M6), and workflow state semantic changes beyond standard M4 progression. Minor note: the execution contract could name the registry artifact more explicitly in scope text, but the description and recon packet together still preserve the intended registry-based isolation boundary without expanding scope.
